title: TraceFix tools.json — domain-tool contract
description: The domain tools an agent may call at runtime. OpenAI function-calling schema plus two TraceFix extensions (agent_ids, can_fail). User-providable for custom tasks; when absent, the runtime's SDK builtins (Read/Write/Edit/Bash) are the domain layer.

name.description: Tool name (used in skip-label comments and prompts).

agent_ids.description: Agent IDs allowed to call this tool. Empty array or absent = every agent may call it.

can_fail.description: If true, the tool may return a failure outcome — the protocol must model both outcomes (an either/or branch, plus a retry loop if recovery re-coordinates).
